title: GitHub/ServiceNow/Jira Connectors — SSRF Guard & Bidirectional Sync
description: test_github_issues_real.py, test_servicenow_sync.py, and test_jira_sync.py form the connector integration test cluster. An ssrf_exploit_servicenow_direct.py script confirms an SSRF vulnerability test exists targeting the ServiceNow connector. The connectors create tickets but bidirectional sync (status updates flowing back from Jira/ServiceNow into ALDECI) is not implemented.
missing: SSRF mitigation: add allowlist validation for all connector URL targets using ipaddress module to block RFC1918/loopback/169.254.x.x ranges
Bidirectional sync: webhook receiver endpoints that accept Jira/ServiceNow status change callbacks and update vuln_lifecycle.db finding status accordingly
Connector health monitor: /api/v1/connectors/health that pings each configured connector, reports latency and last_sync timestamp, alerts on stale sync
